hero_description_line2: meets the tranquility of the underwater world

about.subtitle: Welcome to
about.title: Aquário Apart House
about.text1_part2: , we believe true peace lies in fluidity. Our essence was designed for those who wish to disconnect from the surface and dive into a retreat where organic design and marine life coexist in harmony.
about.text2: Imagine walking over crystal-clear waters on our aquarium floor, dining surrounded by the silent ballet of fish, and recharging in our exclusive Turtle Pool.
about.highlight: We are not just a place to rest, we are your oxygen in the middle of routine.
about.feature6: 10 min from beach and city center

house.subtitle: Feel at home in our
house.title: Apartments
house.description: Each of our apartments is a sanctuary of comfort...

restaurant.subtitle: Where every meal is a dive into the extraordinary
restaurant.title: Restaurant & Bar
restaurant.description: A restaurant-bar where every detail surprises: fresh flavors, immersive drinks, and a unique atmosphere with aquariums on the walls and even under your feet. With snooker, good music, and a unique vibe, it invites you to stay — and come back.

pool.subtitle: Floating has never felt so natural
pool.title: Turtle Pool
pool.description: A unique turtle-shaped pool designed to slow down the senses and wrap the body in a pure relaxation experience. Here, every dive invites lightness, as if time followed the gentle rhythm of the water — a perfect refuge to relax, breathe, and simply float.

testimonials.subtitle: Experiences that speak for themselves
testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.0: A unique experience, between comfort and charming details.
testimonials.1: I have never seen a place like this, unforgettable.
testimonials.2: I would come back without hesitation, everything exceeded expectations.
testimonials.3: Impeccable service and a welcoming atmosphere.

contact.subtitle: We are here for you
contact.title: Contact
contact.name: Name
contact.helperText: Your message will be sent directly via WhatsApp.
